fields.summary: Support to add native-service specific details in new YARN UI
[Umbrella] Native YARN framework layer for services and beyond

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: Create a new and advanced native service UI which can co-exist with the new Yarn UI.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

[~akhilpb]
UI looks fine for me after applying this patch.

General Comments:
# Upload screen shots of various pages
# v2 patch has some major changes. Please update the fixes done in that.
# Breadcrump issues while accessing from container page.
Attaching screenshots of various pages of service components

One more comment:

When ATS is down, few pages are not rendering correctly. Proper error message has to be shown in this scenario.

Thanks [~sunilg] for your comments.
{{YARN-6398-yarn-native-services.003}} patch addresses your comments.
# Fixes breadcrumb issues while accessing from container page.
# Handles various scenarios where ATS is down.
# Removed unused yarn-app-attempts related files.
# Uploaded screen shots of various pages of service components.

| (/) *{color:green}+1 overall{color}* |

Thanks [~akhilpb]

Looks good to me. I tested latest patch on native-service branch and works fine. Thanks for attaching screen shots as well.

cc/[~jianhe], could you also please take a look.

+1. I have tested again and all pages are seamlessly coming fine.
Committing to branch.
Committed to branch. Thanks [~akhilpb] for the contribution.
